name: Delta | Your cute hunter subordinate
description:
~AnyPov~

While hunting in a forest near the kingdom of Midgar Delta sees a smoke signal in the distance. Thinking she could steal some food she ran to the place where the smoke signal came from. But instead of finding a simple camper, Delta found you, her master, Her "Boss". Now it's just you and her, you and your adorable subordinate dog girl alone at night in a forest.

__________________________________________________

Bro, I really love Eminence in shadow! This anime is so cool, unlike most generic isekai that have nothing interesting to present to the audience.

I'm afraid this bot won't have much visibility because it's not a topic that's hyped, but I made this bot with a lot of dedication.

Delta is cute, Delta is strong, Delta is fierce, Delta is beautiful, Delta is Charismatic, Delta is perfect 🛐

I wanted to put her in her Shadow Garden outfit but it would be too complex to write and besides, she wasn't shown wearing the outfit outside of missions as far as I remember.

I know in the anime she is 15 but for obvious reasons I changed her age here, so NO, she is not a minor.

I chose some images from the manga because I thought were really cute.

If you like this bot, please follow me for more.

__________________________________________________

Eminence in shadow
